# VanityURLs

> VanityURLs is open source software for running a budget-friendly short-link and vanity URL service on a user's own Cloudflare account and selected domain.

This deployed instance is a redirect engine, not a public content site. It resolves short paths against a generated registry, applies lifecycle state, and redirects visitors or shows a default status page. Instance owners can customize links, domains, branding, static pages, policy files, and localized public pages.

Do not crawl this instance for link inventory. Respect `/robots.txt`; the default policy disallows crawling except for explicit policy/context files.

## Core Runtime

- [Short-link home](/): Default search-style entry page for typing a short link
- [Lookup a short link](/lookup/): Exact-match destination inspection without opening the target
- [Not found page](/404.html): Default 404 page for missing or deactivated links
- [Disabled page](/disabled.html): Default page for disabled links
- [Expired page](/expired.html): Default page for expired links
- [Maintenance page](/maintenance.html): Default page for temporarily unavailable links

## Machine-Readable Files

- [robots.txt](/robots.txt): Default crawler policy for this redirect instance
- [security.txt](/.well-known/security.txt): Security contact and policy pointer when operator security contact is configured
- [Full LLM context](/llms-full.txt): Longer project summary for agents that can use more context

## Project Documentation

- [Source repository](https://github.com/vanityurls/code): Project README, source code, setup workflow, and issue tracker
- [Link authoring format](https://www.vanityurls.link/en/docs/link-format/): Format for defining short links
- [Runtime registry](https://www.vanityurls.link/en/docs/runtime-registry/): Runtime redirect model and generated schema 3.1 registry
- [Validation and CI](https://www.vanityurls.link/en/docs/validation-ci/): Validation and build checks
- [Admin and stats dashboard](https://www.vanityurls.link/en/docs/admin-dashboard/): Read-only dashboard and protection guidance

## Optional

- [VanityURLs website](https://www.vanityurls.link): Public project documentation site
